summary: All four requirements are substantially implemented. REQ-1 (LoginPrompt redesign), REQ-2 (LandingPage creation), REQ-3 (router update), and REQ-4 (cohesive visual theme) are all present in the diff. There are no meaningful missing requirements. A few minor hallucinated elements are present that were not requested in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution footer link added to the LoginPrompt component
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention or request any attribution footer or external link to caffeine.ai. This was added without being specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Nav bar with a separate Sign In button added to LandingPage in addition to the hero CTA button
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only requires a hero section CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login. The nav bar with a separate Sign In button is an unrequested addition.

hallucinated_features.description: Animated pulse badge labeled Debt Collection Platform in the hero section of LandingPage
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request an animated badge or platform label pill in the hero section. This is an unrequested UI element.
